suite.name: PAT

kw.name: Log To Console
kw.doc: Logs the given message to the console.

test.name: Test Case - Admin Create PAT With Expiry

kw.name: Create Directory
kw.doc: Creates the specified directory.

kw.name: Run
kw.doc: Runs the given command in the system and returns the output.

kw.name: Run
kw.doc: Runs the given command in the system and returns the output.

kw.name: Evaluate
kw.doc: Evaluates the given expression in Python and returns the result.

kw.name: Evaluate
kw.doc: Evaluates the given expression in Python and returns the result.

kw.name: Create Dictionary
kw.doc: Creates and returns a dictionary based on the given ``items``.

kw.name: Set To Dictionary
kw.doc: Adds the given ``key_value_pairs`` and ``items`` to the ``dictionary``.

kw.name: Call Method
kw.doc: Calls the named method of the given object with the provided arguments.

kw.name: Call Method
kw.doc: Calls the named method of the given object with the provided arguments.

kw.doc: Calls the named method of the given object with the provided arguments.

kw.name: Call Method
kw.doc: Calls the named method of the given object with the provided arguments.

kw.name: Set Variable
kw.doc: Returns the given values which can then be assigned to a variables.

kw.name: Log To Console
kw.doc: Logs the given message to the console.

kw.name: Run Keyword And Ignore Error
kw.doc: Runs the given keyword with the given arguments and ignores possible error.

kw.name: Create Webdriver
kw.doc: Creates an instance of Selenium WebDriver.
kw.msg: Creating an instance of the Chrome WebDriver.

kw.name: Log To Console
kw.doc: Logs the given message to the console.

kw.name: Exit For Loop If
kw.doc: Stops executing the enclosing FOR loop if the ``condition`` is true.

kw.name: Sleep
kw.doc: Pauses the test executed for the given time.

kw.name: Run Keyword If
kw.doc: Runs the given keyword with the given arguments, if ``condition`` is true.

kw.name: Should Be Equal As Strings
kw.doc: Fails if objects are unequal after converting them to strings.

kw.name: Sleep
kw.doc: Pauses the test executed for the given time.

kw.name: Go To
kw.doc: Navigates the current browser window to the provided ``url``.

kw.name: Create List
kw.doc: Returns a list containing given items.

kw.name: Retry Action Keyword
kw.arg: Wait Until Element Is Visible And Enabled

kw.name: Retry Keyword N Times When Error
Run Keyword And Ignore Error
kw.doc: Runs the given keyword with the given arguments and ignores possible error.

kw.name: Wait Until Element Is Visible And Enabled
Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is visible.

kw.name: Wait Until Element Is Enabled
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is enabled.

kw.name: Run Keyword If
kw.doc: Runs the given keyword with the given arguments, if ``condition`` is true.

kw.doc: Stops executing the enclosing FOR loop if the ``condition`` is true.

kw.doc: Pauses the test executed for the given time.

kw.doc: Runs the given keyword with the given arguments, if ``condition`` is true.

kw.name: Get Current Date
kw.doc: Returns current local or UTC time with an optional increment.

kw.name: Set Variable
kw.doc: Returns the given values which can then be assigned to a variables.

kw.name: Create PAT Via API
kw.doc: Create a PAT using direct API call

kw.name: Evaluate
kw.doc: Evaluates the given expression in Python and returns the result.

kw.name: Run Process
kw.arg: curl -sk -u admin:Harbor12345 -X POST https://172.16.2.200/api/v2.0/users/1/personal_access_tokens -H "Content-Type: application/json" -d '{"name":"${token_name}","description":"${description}","expires_at":-1}' 2>&1 | grep -q '"id"' && echo "CREATED" || echo "FAILED"
kw.doc: Runs a process and waits for it to complete.
kw.msg: Starting process: bash -c "curl -sk -u admin:Harbor12345 -X POST https://172.16.2.200/api/v2.0/users/1/personal_access_tokens -H \"Content-Type: application/json\" -d '{\"name\":\"test-pat-061781671179\",\"description\":\"Test PAT with 30 day expiry\",\"expires_at\":-1}' 2>&1 | grep -q '\"id\"' && echo \"CREATED\" || echo \"FAILED\""

kw.name: Should Contain
kw.doc: Fails if ``container`` does not contain ``item`` one or more times.

kw.name: Verify Token Exists Via API
kw.doc: Verify token exists via API curl to /api/v2.0/users/1/personal_access_tokens

kw.name: Run Process
kw.arg: curl -sk -u admin:Harbor12345 https://172.16.2.200/api/v2.0/users/1/personal_access_tokens 2>&1 | grep -o '"name":"[^"]*"' | grep -q "${token_name}" && echo "FOUND" || echo "NOT_FOUND"
kw.doc: Runs a process and waits for it to complete.
kw.msg: Starting process: bash -c "curl -sk -u admin:Harbor12345 https://172.16.2.200/api/v2.0/users/1/personal_access_tokens 2>&1 | grep -o '\"name\":\"[^\"]*\"' | grep -q \"test-pat-061781671179\" && echo \"FOUND\" || echo \"NOT_FOUND\""

kw.name: Should Contain
kw.arg: Token ${token_name} not found in API response
kw.doc: Fails if ``container`` does not contain ``item`` one or more times.

kw.name: Log
kw.arg: ✅ Test Case 1 PASSED: Admin PAT with expiry created successfully
kw.doc: Logs the given message with the given level.
kw.msg: ✅ Test Case 1 PASSED: Admin PAT with expiry created successfully

test.doc: Test creating a PAT with expiration date as admin

test.name: Test Case - PAT List Shows Creation And Expiration Dates

kw.name: Should Contain
kw.doc: Fails if ``container`` does not contain ``item`` one or more times.

kw.doc: Runs a process and waits for it to complete.

kw.arg: Token ${token_name} not found in API response
kw.doc: Fails if ``container`` does not contain ``item`` one or more times.

kw.name: Log
kw.arg: ✅ Test Case 2 PASSED: PAT with expiry created and verifiable via API
kw.doc: Logs the given message with the given level.
kw.msg: ✅ Test Case 2 PASSED: PAT with expiry created and verifiable via API

test.doc: Verify that creation and expiration dates display correctly in PAT list

test.name: Test Case - PAT Never Expires

kw.doc: Returns current local or UTC time with an optional increment.

kw.arg: curl -sk -u admin:Harbor12345 -X POST https://172.16.2.200/api/v2.0/users/1/personal_access_tokens -H "Content-Type: application/json" -d '{"name":"${token_name}","description":"${description}","expires_at":-1}' 2>&1 | grep -q '"id"' && echo "CREATED" || echo "FAILED"

kw.msg: Starting process: bash -c "curl -sk -u admin:Harbor12345 -X POST https://172.16.2.200/api/v2.0/users/1/personal_access_tokens -H \"Content-Type: application/json\" -d '{\"name\":\"never-expires-061782189581\",\"description\":\"Token that never expires\",\"expires_at\":-1}' 2>&1 | grep -q '\"id\"' && echo \"CREATED\" || echo \"FAILED\""

kw.doc: Fails if ``container`` does not contain ``item`` one or more times.

kw.name: Log
kw.arg: ✅ Test Case 7 PASSED: Never-expiring PAT created successfully
kw.doc: Logs the given message with the given level.
kw.msg: ✅ Test Case 7 PASSED: Never-expiring PAT created successfully

test.doc: Test creating a PAT that never expires (0 days)

kw.name: Log To Console
kw.arg: \n✅ ALL TESTS PASSED - Clarity 18.2.0 NG0201 NullInjectorError is FIXED!
kw.doc: Logs the given message to the console.

suite.doc: Personal Access Token (PAT) Tests with Clarity 18.2.0
